steps.title: Identify the function of the phrase after the quotation
steps.content: ”An apt assessment given that...” clarifies the quotation rather than introducing a separate independent thought.

steps.title: Apply the correct punctuation rule
steps.content:
A comma properly introduces clarifying material after a quotation. The other options fail:
  • A uses a semicolon (which joins independent clauses)
  • B adds “and” (suggesting parallel items)
  • D omits the punctuation
. That matches choice C — C is correct.
